ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company involved in the transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "traded_value" INTEGER /* Value of the trade */,
  "market_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market type */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_price" TEXT /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker involved in the transaction */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., mobile app, web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("transaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_broker_id FOREIGN KEY ("broker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_market_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_type_id") REFERENCES market_types ("market_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector the company operates in */,
  "company_status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Current account balance */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level of the client */,
  "preferred_broker" INTEGER /* Reference to the preferred broker */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Current status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_types" (
  "market_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market type */,
  "market_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the market type */,
  "market_type_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the market type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market type */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the market */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the market */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "transaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "transaction_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "allowed_actions" TEXT /* Actions allowed for this type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_company_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the relationship (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_company_relationships_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_company_relationships_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the change */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_metadata_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metadata */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metadata_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_metadata_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
